holdings.infoBox: EWP is an equity ETF with a total of 30 individual holdings. The top holdings are Banco Santander stock at 19.40%, Iberdrola at 13.75%, Banco Bilbao Vizcaya Argentaria at 12.92%, CaixaBank at 4.70%, and Industria de Diseño Textil at 4.63%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Spain ETF (EWP) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Spain 25-50 index, a market-cap-weighted index of Spanish companies EWP was launched on Mar 12, 1996 and is issued by BlackRock.
